name: image-video-studio
description: Project-specific Codex plugin only for the image-video SaaS workspace.

interface.longDescription: Image Video Studio gives Codex project-specific context, KB navigation, and a single-agent default workflow for /Users/changliu/workspace/src/github.com/image-video. Multi-agent delegation is opt-in only when the user explicitly asks for it.
defaultPrompt: Use image-video-studio mode for this change.
